title: Cobblemon FC
description: Cobblemon FC is a modpack centered around Cobblemon. Cobblemon FC aims to minimize the number of mods while maximizing the FUN.
body:
## Overview

This modpack is centered around Cobblemon. Vanilla used to be boring. Every time you are thrown into a Minecraft world, you punch down a tree and dig down for ores to make equipments and that's it. However, Cobblemon makes every single activities in Minecraft enjoyable. Pokemon is everywhere you go.

Cobblemon is in early development stage and probably lack things to enjoy. In order to compensate that, couple of mods are added: 

- Create
- Farmer's Delight

Got bored with catching Pokemon? Make gears and conveyor belts. Make factories for crafting Poke Balls! Not a fan of machines? Go on an adventure for finding new crops. Make burgers and cakes with the new crops. 

## Roadmap

Cobblemon FC aims to maximize the fun while minimizing the number of mods. Quality of Life mods are included but are kept minimum in order to let players choose for themselves. As Cobblemon updates are released, new mods might be added for new content or be excluded for compatibility.

## Side Note

Cobblemon FC modpack is initially created for a private server with the same name. However, joining the server is not a must for enjoying Cobblemon FC modpack. You are more than welcome to host a server with this modpack. Besides, I hold no rights for the mods included in this modpack. 

If you are interested in the server, please visit [KakaoTalk OpenChat Server](https://open.kakao.com/o/giXLJ7ef) or [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/8nv2scrEVC).
